data.body: Validity assessment complete: all 8 GitHub Actions major bumps in Dependabot PR #119 are VALID. All target versions exist; 7 are clean Node20->24 runtime bumps with no input/default changes touching our usage (setup-python@v6, codeql-action@v4, upload-artifact@v7, cache@v6, download-artifact@v8, configure-aws-credentials@v6, setup-terraform@v4). The one flagged risk (checkout v6 moved persist-credentials creds to $RUNNER_TEMP, briefly breaking reconcile-bridge's linked-worktree push in v6.0.0) is fixed in v6.0.1+/v7 via a worktrees/* includeIf; the PR pins floating @v7 so it carries the fix. Post-apply state verified consistent across all workflows: checkout@v7, setup-python@v6 everywhere (no leftover v4/v5). All 12 YAML files parse. Applied as Gerrit change 658 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/658); handed to auto-lander with --wait. GitHub PR #119 can be closed once 658 lands on main. CI's 3 failing pytest checks on PR #119 are pre-existing flaky timing tests on main (grounding worker-crash + acli backoff races), unrelated to these workflow-YAML changes.
